10000000: • Increases the Wind DMG of all allies by 50%.
10000001: • Increases the Ice DMG of all allies by 50%.
10000002: • Increases the Fire DMG of all allies by 50%.
10000003: • Increases the Physical DMG of all allies by 50%.
10000004: • Increases the Lightning DMG of all allies by 50%.
10000005: • Increases DMG dealt by all allies' Skill by 25%. At the beginning of each Cycle, regenerates 2 Skill Point(s).
10000006: • Increases DMG dealt by Ultimate by 25% for all allies. At the beginning of each Cycle, all allies regenerate 20 Energy.
10000007: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases the DMG dealt by the ally with the highest ATK by 60% for 1 turn(s).
10000008: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases the Weakness Break Efficiency of each ally's next attack by 50%.
10000009: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases all allies' CRIT Rate by 8%. This effect can stack up to 5 time(s).
10000010: • At the beginning of each Cycle, restores HP for the ally with the lowest HP by 60% of their Max HP.
10000011: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases the DMG of every ally's next attack by 50%.
10000012: • At the beginning of each Cycle, provide a Shield to all allies that can absorb DMG equal to 25% of their respective Max HP.
10000013: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases CRIT Rate by 20% and CRIT DMG by 40% for allies with current HP percentage higher than 80% of their Max HP for 2 turn(s).
10000014: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases the DMG taken by all enemies by 35%, lasting until the enemies' next action begins.
11000000: • DMG dealt to enemy targets are shared between all enemies. When allies use AoE or Blast ATK abilities, increases DMG dealt by 50%.
11000001:
• All enemies receive increased DoT by 50%.
  • At the start of every Cycle, there is a high chance of inflicting Bleed, Shock, Burn, and Wind Shear on all enemies. Status inflicted in this way will last for 2 turn(s).
11000002: • After an ally uses Basic ATK, increases DMG dealt by them and adjacent allies by 50% and reduces their DMG received by 50% for 1 turn(s).
11000003: • After an ally target uses their Ultimate or launches a Follow-Up ATK, additionally deals a set amount of DMG to the attacked enemy target.
11000004:
• At the start of every Cycle, summon 2 Mara-Struck Soldiers or Abundance Sprite: Golden Hounds.
  • After an enemy target is defeated, deals a set amount of DMG to all enemies.
11000005:
• After an ally uses their Skill on any ally (including on themselves), dispels 1 debuff on the ally which the Skill was used on. For each debuff dispelled, increases the DMG dealt by all allies by 20%. This effect can stack up to 10 stack(s).
  • Defeating the Elite or stronger enemy in the final Wave will immediately result in victory.
12000000: • At the beginning of each Cycle, randomly causes an ally following the Path of The Hunt or the Path of Erudition to take action immediately, and increases their DMG dealt by 50% for 1 turn(s).
12000001: • At the beginning of each Cycle, applies 3 stack(s) of Memory Imprint to all allies until the beginning of the next Cycle. Allies who are under Memory Imprint deal Additional DMG equal to 80% of the character's ATK to a random enemy after launching attacks at the cost of 1 stack of Memory Imprint.
12000002: • At the beginning of each Cycle, increases the Lightning DMG taken by all enemies by 35%, lasting until the enemies' next action begins.
12000003: • Apply Memory Imprint to all enemies at the beginning of each Cycle. For each other debuff currently on the enemy, apply 1 extra stack of Memory Imprint to that enemy. Each stack reduces the target's DMG dealt by 4% for a maximum of 5 stack(s). This effect lasts until the start of the next Cycle.
12000004: • Apply Memory Imprint to all enemies at the beginning of each Cycle. For each other debuff currently on the enemy, apply 1 extra stack of Memory Imprint to that enemy. Each stack reduces the target's DEF by 6% for a maximum of 5 stack(s). This effect lasts until the start of the next Cycle.
12000005: • At the start of every Cycle, allies whose current HP percentage is greater than 80% increase their ATK by 50% for 1 turn(s).
12000006:
• When an ally is hit or consumes their own HP, gain 1 stack of Memory Imprint. Each stack of Memory Imprint reduces DMG taken by the target by 12%, up to 3 stack(s).
  • At the start of each Cycle, deals a set amount of DMG to all enemies based on the highest Memory Imprint stack count on an ally. Then, remove all Memory Imprint stacks from all allies.
12000007: • After an ally target uses a Follow-Up ATK, the All-Type RES of the attacked enemy target decreases by 30% for 2 turn(s).
12000008: • At the start of each Cycle, all enemies currently inflicted with DoT are immediately dealt DMG equal to 200% of the original DMG from all their DoT effects.
12000009: • Summons a Trotter at the beginning of each Wave or each Cycle. The Trotter takes 200% more DMG from Basic ATKs and DoT effects. When defeated, recovers 2 Skill Points for all allies.
12000010: • Summons a Trotter at the beginning of each Wave or each Cycle. And this Trotter takes 200% increased Basic ATK and Ultimate DMG. When defeated, it deals a set amount of DMG to all enemies.
12000011: • Summons a Trotter at the beginning of each Wave and each Cycle. And this Trotter takes 200% increased Skill and Ultimate DMG. When defeated, it inflicts Vulnerability on all enemies, making them take 30% more DMG for 2 turn(s). This effect stacks up to 2 times.
12000012:
• When the same ally acts consecutively, they receive 1 stack of Memory Imprint. When allies with Memory Imprint attack, every Memory Imprint stack has a 40% fixed chance to inflict the target with Dissociation that lasts for 1 turn(s). Allies with Memory Imprint deal 40% more DMG. This effect cannot be stacked. When a different ally acts, remove all Memory Imprint stacks on the field.
  • Dissociation: This state is considered as the Freeze state. Affected units cannot take action. When this state is removed, the affected target receives Ice Additional DMG equal to 15% of their respective Max HP.
12000013: • At the start of every Wave or Cycle, apply Memory Imprint to an enemy target of Elite level or higher. When targets with Memory Imprint receive DMG, other enemy targets receive DMG equal to 30% of the original DMG. This effect lasts until the start of the next Cycle.
12000014: • After an ally target unleashes an Ultimate or a Follow-Up ATK, deals Additional DMG equal to 60% of the attacking character's ATK to the attacked enemy target for 4 times.
12000015:
• After an ally uses their Skill or Ultimate to attack, add 1 Hit(s) Per Action to Memory Turbulence, up to 10 extra hit(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, every hit will deal DMG based on the enemy targets' respective Max HP to random enemy targets 1 time.
12000016: • When an ally uses their Ultimate, obtain Memory Imprint. This effect stacks up to 10 time(s). At the start of every Cycle, regenerate Energy to all allies based on the number of Memory Imprint stacks (Each stack regenerates 10 Energy). Energy obtained in this way can exceed allies' Max Energy.
12000017:
• After an ally Breaks enemies' Weaknesses or attacks Weakness Broken enemies, add 1 Hit(s) Per Action to Memory Turbulence, up to 10 extra hit(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, every hit will deal DMG based on the enemy targets' respective Max HP to random enemy targets 1 time.
12000018: • At the start of every Wave or Cycle, randomly applies a debuff for 10 time(s), selected from the following: Reduce ATK by 8%, reduce DEF by 8%, reduce SPD by 8%, reduce Effect RES by 8%, or increase the received Follow-Up ATK DMG by 20%. Each debuff can stack up to 3 time(s) and lasts for 3 turn(s). At the same time, enables 1 ally following either the Path of The Hunt or Path of Destruction to immediately take action.
12000019:
• All allies' Basic ATKs and Skills deal 50% increased DMG. Whenever a Skill Point is consumed, Memory Turbulence gains 1 hit(s) per action, up to a maximum of 10.
  • At the beginning of each Cycle, for each Hit Per Action, Memory Turbulence deals DMG to a random enemy based on the target's Max HP.
12000020:
• Summons a Trotter at the beginning of each Wave or each Cycle. The Trotter takes 200% increased DMG from Basic ATKs and DoT effects.
  • When the Trotter is defeated, if any enemies are in Bleed, Shock, Burn, or Wind Shear state, immediately deals DMG equal to 50% of the original DoT effect to them, with a high chance to inflict Bleed, Shock, Burn, or Wind Shear on all enemies for 3 turn(s).
12000021:
• After every attack launched by an ally, apply 1 stack of Memory Imprint to all enemies. Enemies with Memory Imprint receive 5% more DMG. This effect stacks up to 6 stack(s). When Memory Imprint stacks to maximum stacks, immediately deal DMG based on a certain percentage of each enemy's respective Max HP 1 time to all enemies.
  • When enemy targets enter combat and other units in the field currently have Memory Imprints, the new enemies will receive the same number of Memory Imprint stacks as those on the field.
  • At the start of every Wave or Cycle, remove Memory Imprint from all enemies.
12000022:
• After every attack launched by an ally, applies 1 stack of Memory Imprint to all allies. Allies in the Memory Imprint state deal 5% more DMG. This effect stacks up to 6 time(s). When Memory Imprint reaches max stacks, immediately regenerate 25% Energy for all allies. The Energy regenerated by this effect can exceed the target's Max Energy.
  • Remove all Memory Imprints from all allies at the start of every Wave or Cycle.
12000023:
• At the start of every Wave or Cycle, summon 1 Trotter onto the field. The Trotter will be immediately defeated when it is Weakness Broken.
  • After the Trotter is defeated, Advance the attacker's Action forward by 100%, then apply Memory Imprint to all allies. Every stack of Memory Imprint increases the target's ATK by 15% and Break Effect by 30%, up to a max of 5 stack(s).
12000024:
• After an ally target uses their Follow-Up ATK or Skill to attack, add 1 Hit(s) Per Action to Memory Turbulence, up to 10 extra hit(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, every hit will deal DMG based on the enemy targets' respective Max HP to random enemy targets 1 time.
12000025:
• After every attack launched by an ally, apply 1 stack of Memory Imprint to all allies. Allies in the Memory Imprint state deal 8% more DMG. This effect stacks up to 6 time(s). When Memory Imprint reaches max stacks, immediately deals 1 instance of DMG to all enemies based on a certain percentage of their respective Max HP.
  • Remove all Memory Imprints from all allies at the start of every Wave or Cycle.
12000026:
• Enemies have Exo-Toughness and their actions are delayed by 30% after they are Weakness Broken. At the same time, add 1 hit(s) to Memory Turbulence's Hits Per Action. If the target is an Elite enemy or higher, then additionally add 2 hit(s), up to a max of 10 hit(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, every hit by the Memory Turbulence causes 1 instance of DMG, dealing a set amount of DMG to random enemy targets.
12000027:
• When an enemy target's Weakness is Broken, add 1 hit(s) to Memory Turbulence's Hits Per Action. If the target is an Elite enemy or higher, then additionally add 1 hit(s), up to a max increase of 15 hit(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, every hit by the Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of a set amount of DMG to random enemy targets, and the Hits Per Action is not reset.
12000028: • At the start of each Wave or Cycle, summons 2 Trotters onto the field. When defeated, the Trotters deal a set amount of DMG for 1 time to all Elite level enemies and above.
12000029: • At the start of each Cycle, regenerates 20% Energy for all ally characters. The Energy regenerated by this effect can exceed the target's Max Energy. Enables all memosprites on the field to immediately take action again after their next action.
12000030:
• Increases all allies' Max HP by 30%. Every time an ally is attacked, restores HP equal to 5% of their Max HP and adds 1 hit(s) to the Hits Per Action of Memory Turbulence. Every time an ally consumes HP, restores HP equal to 10% of their Max HP and adds 2 hit(s) to the Hits Per Action of Memory Turbulence. This effect can only trigger once per attack and up to 20 hit(s) can be added this way.
  • At the beginning of each Cycle, each hit from Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to a random enemy target.
12000031:
• All allies' Skill Lv. +3 and Memosprite Skill Lv. +2. After any character uses their Skill or Memosprite Skill, 1 random attacked target gains 1 random Weakness they did not already possess.
  • At the beginning of each Cycle, Memory Turbulence deals True DMG to all enemy targets 1 time. If a target has more than 3 Weaknesses, deals 1 additional instance of True DMG for each additional Weakness.
12000032:
• After the ally character in position 1 uses their Ultimate, both they and their memosprite will gain Memory Imprint, lasting for 1 turn(s). Increases DMG dealt by targets with Memory Imprint by 40%, and adds 2 Hits Per Action to Memory Turbulence, up to 10 Hit(s).
  • At the start of each Cycle, Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to random enemy target with each Hit Per Action.
12000033: • At the start of every Wave or Cycle, apply Memory Imprint to an enemy target of Elite level or higher. This effect lasts until the start of the next Cycle. Memory Imprint is a special kind of Burn effect. The holders of this effect receive Fire DoT at the start of each turn. When ally targets use their Skill Attacks on a target with Memory Imprint, they will deal DMG equal to 220% of the attacker's ATK to the target and adjacent targets.
12000034:
• After an ally character uses a Skill to attack or a memosprite attacks, add 1 Hit(s) Per Action to Memory Turbulence, up to 10 hit(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, each hit from Memory Turbulence deals True DMG to a random enemy target 1 time.
12000035:
• When ally character has any summons, this unit and summons gain 40% DMG Boost.
  • At the start of each Cycle, Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to all enemies, plus 1 additional instance for each ally summon, up to 2 instances.
12000036:
• When an ally target attacks an Elite or Boss enemy with a corresponding Type Weakness, add 1 hit(s) Per Action to Memory Turbulence. Breaking an Elite or Boss enemy's Weakness adds an additional 1 hit(s) Per Action, stacking up to 10 hit(s).
  • At the start of each Cycle, each hit of Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to a random enemy target.
12000037:
• At the start of each Wave, recovers 4 Skill Point(s) for allies. When ally targets use Skills or consume Skill Points, add 1 hit(s) to Memory Turbulence, stacking up to 15 hit(s).
  • At the start of each Cycle, each hit of Memory Turbulence deals True DMG once to a random enemy target.
12000038:
• At the start of each Wave or Cycle, gains 5 Punchline point(s). When obtaining Punchline, adds a corresponding amount of Charge to Memory Turbulence, stacking up to 50 point(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to enemy targets based on the amount of Charge points.
12000039:
• After an ally target uses an attack, they gain 1 Punchline point(s) and adds a corresponding amount of Charge to Memory Turbulence, stacking up to 20 point(s).
  • At the start of every Cycle, Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to all enemies based on the amount of Charge points.
12000040:
• Increases CRIT DMG dealt by ally targets when they use their Ultimate by 50%. After using an Ultimate, adds 2 hit(s) to Memory Turbulence, stacking up to 20 hit(s).
  • At the start of each Cycle, each hit of Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to one random enemy target.
12000041:
• Increases Ultimate and Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by ally targets by 50%. After an ally character uses an Ultimate or Follow-Up ATK, adds 1 hit(s) to Memory Turbulence, stacking up to 15 hit(s).
  • At the start of each Cycle, each hit of Memory Turbulence deals 1 instance of True DMG to one random enemy target.
12000042: • At the beginning of each Cycle, randomly causes an ally target following the Path of The Hunt or the Path of Erudition to take action immediately, and increases their DMG dealt by 80% for 1 turn(s).
20000000: When allies use their Ultimate to attack an enemy target, inflicts the target with Shatter, stacking up to 6 time(s). At the start of the target's turn or when the target is defeated, deals a set amount of DMG to the target and adjacent targets based on the number of Shatter stacks.
20000001: Increases DoT taken by enemy targets by 35%. Enemy targets that receive DoT have their DMG dealt reduced by 35%. After they are attacked, their action is Advanced Forward by 35%.
20000002: Accumulate the amount of DMG dealt by allies' Follow-Up ATKs. When this DMG amount reaches 100%, deal a set amount of DMG to all enemies.
20000003: After an ally attacks an enemy target with a Follow-Up ATK, charges Whimsicality based on the number of targets attacked. When charged to 10 point(s), deals a set amount of DMG to random enemy targets 10 time(s).
20000004: When allies Break enemy targets' Weakness, charge Whimsicality. When charged to 6 point(s), deals a set amount of DMG to random enemies 10 time(s).
20000005: After allies use Skill to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 5 Grit Value for allies.
20000006: After allies use Ultimate to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 5 Grit Value for allies.
20000007: After an ally uses Basic ATK or Ultimate to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
20000008: Every time a DoT is received by an enemy target, additionally accumulates 2 Grit Value for allies.
20000009: Each time Punchline is gained, allies will additionally accumulate 2 Grit Value.
20000010: When an ally target inflicts a debuff on an enemy target, allies additionally accumulate 1 Grit Value. This effect can be triggered up to 10 time(s) per enemy target.
20000011: After ally targets use a Follow-Up ATK to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 8 Grit Value for allies.
21000000: When allies use an Ultimate to attack targets, inflicts 2 stack(s) of Shatter to the target.
21000001: When enemies enter combat, there is a 80% chance to instantly receive 1 stack of Shatter.
21000002: When enemy targets with Shatter are defeated, increases DMG dealt by Ultimate for all allies in this battle by 15%, stacking up to 20 times.
21000003: When an enemy takes DoT, adjacent targets also take DoT of the same type by an amount equal to 60% of the original DMG dealt.
21000004: After allies attack enemies, inflicts Wind Shear on the target, causing the target to take a set amount of Wind DoT at the start of every turn.
21000005: When an enemy takes DoT, the ally with the lowest HP percentage will heal for 10% of their Max HP, and their action will be Advanced Forward by 8%.
21000006: Characters' Follow-Up ATKs deal 50% increased DMG, and this effect will be triggered 1 additional time after triggering Whimsicality's effect.
21000007: When Ultimate deals DMG to the enemy target, it will be considered as a Follow-Up ATK.
21000008: Whenever a character hits an enemy target with a Follow-Up ATK, all allies' actions are Advanced Forward by 14%. This effect can only be triggered once for each attack.
21000009: When allies use a Skill to attack enemy targets, there is a 80% fixed chance to inflict Shatter to the target.
21000010: When enemy targets use their abilities, inflicts 1 stack of Scalded on them and adjacent units. While in the Scalded state, targets receive 10% more DMG, stacking up to 3 stack(s). This effect is effective on the set amount of DMG from the Whimsicality effect.
21000011: After characters use an Ultimate to attack, their action is Advanced Forward by 25% and deals 100% more DMG, lasting for 1 turn(s).
21000012: Whimsicality no longer requires accumulation of DMG dealt by Follow-Up ATK. Instead, it triggers after allies use 3 instances of Follow-Up ATK and the DMG dealt by this effect increases by 60%.
21000013: When the Whimsicality effect is triggered, regenerates Energy for all allies equal to 35% of their respective Max Energy. Energy recovered via this effect can exceed the ally's Max Energy.
21000014: Apart from Follow-Up ATKs, all other kinds of DMG dealt by allies can also accumulate progress equal to 18% of the original DMG amount.
21000015: When enemy targets are defeated, the DoTs on them have a 100% base chance to be transferred to all enemies.
21000016: After enemy targets enter combat, they become afflicted by Wind Shear. At the start of every turn, they receive a set amount of Wind DoT and inflict Wind Shear on themselves and adjacent enemy targets.
21000017: When 3 or more characters following the Path of Nihility are in the team, increases all allies' DMG dealt by 60% and SPD by 30%.
21000018: Reduces the Charge points required to trigger Whimsicality by 4 and deals DMG 4 more time(s).
21000019: Increases DMG dealt from allies by Ultimate by 30%. After the Ultimate is used, Whimsicality additionally gains 2 point(s) of Charge.
21000020: After allies attack enemy targets, Whimsicality additionally gains 1 point(s) of Charge.
21000021: Increases DMG dealt with Shatter by 20%. When triggered, applies 1 stack of Shatter to adjacent targets.
21000022: When allies' Follow-Up ATKs hit enemy targets, there is a 60% fixed chance to apply 1 stack of Shatter to the target. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per attack per enemy target.
21000023: Increases the Break DMG taken by all enemies by 10%. If allies dealt Super Break DMG to enemies after using an attack, additionally charges Whimsicality by 1 point(s).
21000024: Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt increases by 50%. Follow-Up ATKs' Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50%.
21000025: When characters launch attacks by using their Ultimate, they will ignore the enemy targets' Weakness to cause Toughness Reduction.
21000026: Increases all allies' Break Effect by 30%. When Breaking enemy targets, all enemies become afflicted with Wind Shear, taking a set amount of Wind DoT at the start of every turn. All enemies become immune to Crowd Control debuffs.
21000027: After any ally target uses Ultimate to attack any enemy target and if the target currently has 1/2/3 types of DoTs, each currently active DoT immediately deals DMG equal to 60%/100%/150% of the original DMG.
21000028:
• During Surging Grit, all ally Skills do not consume Skill Points. After characters use Skills or Ultimate, they gain 1 stack of Feverish Surge for every enemy target hit. These stacks will increase said characters' Skill and Ultimate DMG by 4% and SPD by 4% to a max of 10 stack(s).
  • After allies use Ultimate to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000029:
• During Surging Grit, increases all allies' Follow-Up ATK DMG by 40%. After triggering a Follow-Up ATK, deals a set amount of DMG to every attacked enemy target and adjacent target.
  • After allies launch a Follow-Up ATK, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 2 Grit Value for allies.
21000030:
• During Surging Grit, increases Break DMG received by enemy targets by 30%. When characters Break enemy targets' Weaknesses, advances the character's action by 12%.
  • After allies attack enemy targets, every enemy target that becomes Weakness Broken additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000031:
• During Surging Grit, after an enemy target is defeated by any unit, there is a 50% chance for all allies to gain 1 stack of Resound.
  • After allies launch a Follow-Up ATK, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 2 Grit Value for allies.
21000032:
• During Surging Grit, all allies' SPD increases by 40%. When all Resound is consumed in an attack, recover 1 Skill Point.
  • After allies use Skill to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000033: • When entering Surging Grit, activates the Ultimate of the first character on the team lineup and increases their DMG dealt by Ultimate during Surging Grit by 50%.
21000034:
• During Surging Grit, after allies use their Skill or launch a Follow-Up ATK against enemy targets with Shatter, Shatter can be immediately triggered.
  • After allies use a Skill or launch a Follow-Up ATK, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 2 Grit Value for allies.
21000035:
• During Surging Grit, increases Break DMG taken by enemy targets by 30%. When targets in the Shatter state are defeated by any unit, deals 10 Toughness Reduction regardless of Weakness Type to adjacent enemy targets.
  • When enemy target's Weakness is Broken, additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000036:
• During Surging Grit, when any character uses their Skill, consumes HP equal to 20% of their current HP. Additionally, after using Skill, restores HP equal to 20% of their Max HP.
  • Each time any ally character receives an attack or loses HP, allies will additionally accumulate 2 Grit Value.
21000037:
• During Surging Grit, when any ally uses their Skill, consumes HP equal to 20% of their Max HP. Then, after using Skill, restores HP equal to 20% of their Max HP.
  • Each time any ally character receives an attack or loses HP, allies will additionally accumulate 3 Grit Value.
21000038:
• All allies can also reduce Toughness when attacking enemies that don't have the corresponding Weakness Type, with the effect equivalent to 50% of the original Toughness Reduction value. This cannot stack with other Toughness Reduction effects that also ignore Weakness Type. During Surging Grit, the Break DMG received by enemy targets increases by 30%.
  • After allies attack enemy targets, every enemy target that becomes Weakness Broken additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000039: • After consuming Resound to deal DMG, increases all allies' DMG dealt by 60% for 1 turn(s).
21000040: • During the Surging Grit period, the ally targets' DoT dealt ignores 20% of the target's All-Type RES. When the enemy target receives DoT, increases all allies DoT dealt by 1%. Up to a max of 99 stack(s). Lasts until Surging Grit ends.
21000041:
• During Surging Grit, Skill DMG dealt by ally targets increases by 50%. When attacking targets with the special Wind Shear Echo Enigma, each stack of Echo Enigma additionally increases Skill DMG by 10%.
  • Every enemy target hit with ally targets' Skills additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000042:
• Every stack of Echo Enigma increases enemy target's DMG received by 3%. During the Surging Grit period, when enemy targets enter combat, and after they take action, additionally adds 1 stack(s) of the special Wind Shear Echo Enigma.
  • After enemy targets are defeated, additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000043:
• During Surging Grit, memosprite's DMG increases by 30%, and when memosprite disappears, memomaster's action advances by 15%.
  • After memosprites' attacks, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000044:
• Upon entering Surging Grit, immediately recover 3 Skill Point(s). During Surging Grit, enemy targets take 30% more DoT.
  • Every time a DoT is received by an enemy target, additionally accumulates 1 Grit Value for allies.
21000045: • During Surging Grit, after an ally uses a Skill to attack enemy targets, they deal additional True DMG equal to 30% of the original damage to each enemy target hit.
21000046: • During Surging Grit, when an ally target uses their Ultimate, increases all allies DMG dealt by 15%, stacking up to 5 times. This effect lasts until Surging Grit ends.
21000047:
• Upon entering Surging Grit, immediately recover 3 Skill Point(s). During Surging Grit, enemy targets take 30% more DoT.
  • Every time a DoT is received by an enemy target, additionally accumulates 1 Grit Value for allies.
21000048:
• During Surging Grit, increases all allies SPD by 20%, and after using a Skill, apply 1 stack(s) of Resound to all allies.
  • After allies use Skill to attack enemy targets, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000049:
• During Surging Grit, each stack of Echo Enigma increases Weakness Break Efficiency by 10% when ally targets deal damage.
  • When enemy target's Weakness is Broken, additionally accumulates 5 Grit Value for allies.
21000050:
• Every stack of Echo Enigma increases enemy target's DMG received by 3%. During Surging Grit, enemy targets gain 1 stack(s) of Echo Enigma after a memosprite attacks them.
  • After memosprites' attacks, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000051:
• Upon entering Surging Grit, Breaks all enemy targets' Weakness and recovers 4 Skill Point(s). During Surging Grit, Break DMG dealt to enemy targets increases by 50%.
  • After allies attack enemy targets, every enemy target that becomes Weakness Broken additionally accumulates 5 Grit Value for allies.
21000052: • During Surging Grit, enemy targets take 30% more Elation DMG, and additionally increases Aha Instant's SPD by 20.
21000053:
• After an ally target uses their Basic ATK or Skill, gains 1 Punchline. During Surging Grit, the ally targets' DMG dealt increases by 50%.
  • For each enemy target hit with Basic ATK or Skill, ally team additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value.
21000054:
• When an ally target deals Break DMG with an attack, gains 1 Punchline. During Surging Grit, Break DMG dealt to enemy targets increases by 30%.
  • When enemy target's Weakness is Broken, additionally accumulates 5 Grit Value for allies.
21000055:
• During Surging Grit, Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by ally targets increases by 50%. After an ally target uses a Follow-Up ATK, applies 1 stack(s) of Resound to all allies.
  • After allies launch a Follow-Up ATK, every enemy target hit additionally accumulates 3 Grit Value for allies.
21000056:
• During Surging Grit, all allies' SPD increases by 35%. When all Resound is consumed in an attack, recover 1 Skill Point.
  • After allies use Basic ATK or Skill, for each enemy target hit, additionally accumulates 2 Grit Value for allies.
21000057:
• During Surging Grit, DoT taken by enemy targets increases by 50%. When an enemy target is defeated, allies gain 1 Punchline for each DoT effect this target is afflicted with.
  • Every time a DoT is received by an enemy target, additionally accumulates 1 Grit Value for allies.
21000058:
• Increases Ultimate and Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by ally targets by 40%. During Surging Grit, each time an enemy target is inflicted with the Dejection effect, it changes to stacking 2 stack(s) of this effect instead. The max stacking limit of the Dejection effect increases to 50 stack(s).
  • After allies use Ultimate or Follow-Up ATK, for each enemy target hit, additionally accumulates 1 Grit Value for allies.
21000059:
• After an ally character uses an Elation Skill to attack an enemy target, inflicts the Indulgence effect on the attacked enemy target, increasing the DMG taken by this target by 15% for 2 turn(s). This effect applied by each character exists independently. Upon entering Surging Grit, allies gain 40 Punchline(s).
  • After allies use Basic ATK or Skill, for each enemy target hit, additionally accumulates 1 Grit Value for allies.
21000060:
• After an ally target uses a Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate to attack an enemy target, there is a 100% base chance to reduce the attacked enemy target's DEF by 3%, lasting for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 10 times.
  • After allies attack enemy targets, additionally accumulates 1 Grit Value.
21000061: • Increases the All-Type RES PEN of Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by 30%. During Surging Grit, after an ally target uses a Follow-Up ATK to attack enemy targets, deals Additional DMG equal to 40% of the attacker's ATK plus 20% of the attacker's Max HP to targets adjacent to each attacked enemy target. This DMG is considered as Follow-Up ATK DMG.
21000062:
• During Surging Grit, CRIT DMG dealt by ally targets when using their Ultimate increases by 60%. When Surging Grit ends, all allies regenerate 20% Energy.
  • TBD
21000063:
• Increases the SPD of all allies by 20%. During Surging Grit, DMG received by enemy targets additionally increases by 30%.
  • TBD
21000064:
• After an ally memosprite uses an attack, gains 2 Punchline. During Surging Grit, DMG dealt by ally memosprites increases by 50%.
  • TBD
22000000: At the start of battle, after an ally uses their Skill to attack an enemy target, deals a set amount of DMG to all attacked enemy targets.
22000001: Upon entering Surging Grit, advances all allies actions by 100% and increases DMG received by enemy targets during this period by 50%. Additionally, after an ally uses their Skill to attack an enemy target, deals an additional set amount of DMG to all attacked enemy targets and adjacent targets.
22000002: After an enemy target is defeated by any unit, all allies gain 1 stack of Resound.
22000003: When entering Surging Grit, consume all Resound. Each stack of Resound deals 1 instance of a set amount of DMG to a random enemy target. During Surging Grit, increases enemy targets' DMG taken by 50%, and after they are defeated by any unit, all allies additionally gain 1 stack of Resound. When Resound stacks up to 10 or higher, consumes all Resound stacks and deals 1 instance of a set amount of DMG to a random enemy target per stack.
22000004: When allies use their Basic ATK or Ultimate to attack any enemy targets, inflicts the target with Shatter, stacking up to 3 time(s). At the start of the target's turn or when the target is defeated by any unit, deals True DMG to the target based on the number of Shatter stacks.
22000005: Upon entering Surging Grit, immediately regenerates 30% Energy for all allies. The Energy regenerated by this effect can exceed the target's Max Energy. Increases DMG taken by enemy targets during this period by 50%. Additionally, triggering Shatter will deal True DMG to all attacked enemy targets and adjacent targets.
22000006: When an enemy target enters battle, they are inflicted with 1 stack(s) of Echo Enigma, which deals a special kind of Wind Shear, and they suffer 1 stack(s) of Echo Enigma after acting, receiving Wind DoT at the start of each turn. Goes up to 10 stack(s) at max for 3 turn(s).
22000007: Entering the Surging Grit state causes all enemies to suffer 5 stack(s) of the special Wind Shear Echo Enigma, and causes all currently suffered DoT to immediately produce DMG equal to 100% of the original DMG. During the Surging Grit period, increases enemy targets' DMG received by 50%, reduces DMG dealt by 35%, and increases SPD by 50%.
22000008: This stage has a special Elation Skill. When entering Aha Instant, deals 15 instance(s) of Imaginary Elation DMG to a random enemy target. When an enemy target is defeated by any target, obtains 1 Punchline point(s).
22000009: Upon entering Surging Grit, Aha immediately gains an extra turn where a fixed amount of 20 Punchline is taken into account. During this turn, Punchline is not consumed, and Elation Skill DMG dealt is 50% of the original DMG. During Surging Grit, DMG taken by enemy targets increases by 50%, and Aha Instant's SPD increases by 40.
22000010: Decreases enemy targets' Effect RES by 30%. Increases DMG taken by enemy targets afflicted with 4 or more debuffs by 20%.
22000011: Upon entering Surging Grit, deals a set amount of DMG to enemy targets 1 time for every debuff they are inflicted with. During Surging Grit, DMG received by enemy targets increases by 50%. After each time an enemy target is inflicted with a debuff, inflicts 1 stack of Dejection on them, decreasing their All-Type RES by 1% for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 20 time(s).
22000012: After an ally target uses a Follow-Up ATK or Ultimate, deals Additional DMG equal to 80% of the attacking character's ATK plus 40% of their Max HP to each attacked enemy target.
22000013: Upon entering Surging Grit, all allies regenerate 20% Energy. During Surging Grit, enemy targets take 50% more DMG, the Additional DMG dealt by Concordant Truce increases by 100%, and this DMG is considered as Follow-Up ATK DMG.
30000000:
• When an enemy with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, recovers Skill Points for all allies and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases the Weakness Break DMG received by all enemies by 15%, and additionally increases Super Break DMG received by 25%.
30000001:
• When an enemy unit with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, all allies' actions are Advanced Forward by 100%, and their Ultimates are activated.
  • Follow-Up ATK DMG received by all enemies increases by 15%, and increases Counter DMG by 25%.
30000002:
• When an enemy with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, advances all allies' action and recovers Skill Points.
  • Increases the Follow-Up ATK DMG taken by all enemies by 25% and increases Ultimate DMG taken by 15%.
30000003:
• When an enemy unit with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, recovers Skill Points for all ally characters and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases the Weakness Break DMG taken by all enemies by 20%, and increases Follow-Up ATK DMG taken by 20%.
30000004:
• When an enemy unit with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, action advances all allies and recovers Skill Points.
  • Increases the Weakness Break DMG taken by all enemies by 20%, and increases Follow-Up ATK DMG taken by 20%.
30000005:
• When an enemy with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies, recovers their Skill Points, and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases the Skill DMG taken by all enemies by 25% and increases Ultimate DMG taken by 15%.
30000006:
• When an enemy with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, dispel control states for all allies, recover their Skill Points, and restore their HP.
  • Increases the Basic ATK DMG taken by all enemies by 15% and increases Skill DMG taken by 25%.
30000007:
• When enemy units with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies, and allies immediately take action and restore HP.
  • All enemies take 25% more Memosprite Skill DMG, and 15% more Skill DMG.
30000008:
• When an enemy unit with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies, recovers their Skill Points, and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases all allies' HP restored by 50%.
30000009:
• When an enemy with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, the control states for all allies are dispelled, their Skill Points are recovered, and their Ultimates are activated.
  • The Skill DMG taken by all enemies increases by 25%.
30000010:
• When enemy units with Steadfast Safeguard have their Weakness Broken, dispels all control debuffs, recovers Skill Points, and activates Ultimates for all allies.
  • All enemies take 25% more DoT. Increases Skill DMG by 15%.
30000011:
• When enemy units with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, dispels control effects for all allies, activates Ultimates and restores HP.
  • All enemies take 10% more Memosprite Skill DMG, and 30% more Skill DMG.
30000012:
• When enemy targets with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies, and allies immediately take action and restore HP.
  • All enemy targets take 15% more Memosprite Skill DMG, and 25% more Ultimate DMG.
30000013:
• When enemy targets with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies, and allies immediately take action and recovers Skill Points.
  • Increases Break DMG taken by all enemy targets by 25%, and Memosprite Skill DMG taken by 15%.
30000014:
• When an enemy target with Steadfast Safeguard is inflicted with Weakness Break, dispels control states from all allies, restores Skill Points, immediately takes action, and grants Aha an extra turn (this turn will count as 10 fixed Punchline points).
  • Increases Elation DMG dealt to all enemies by 25% and Break DMG by 15%.
30000015:
• When an enemy target with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases the Elation DMG taken by all enemy targets by 25% and increases Weakness Break DMG taken by 15%.
30000016:
• When an enemy target with Steadfast Safeguard is inflicted with Weakness Break, dispels control states from all allies, action advances, and grants Aha an extra turn (this turn will count as 10 fixed Punchline points).
  • Increases Ultimate DMG dealt to all enemies by 25% and Elation DMG by 15%.
30000017:
• When an enemy with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, dispels control states for all allies, recovers their Skill Points, and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases the Skill DMG taken by all enemies by 25% and increases Ultimate DMG taken by 15%.
30000018:
• When an enemy target with Steadfast Safeguard is Weakness Broken, dispels control debuffs for all ally targets and activates their Ultimates.
  • Increases Skill DMG taken by all enemy targets by 25% and increases Elation DMG taken by 15%.
31000000: Increases all allies' Break Effect by 50%. After dealing Super Break DMG to enemies, increases SPD by an amount equal to 40% of current SPD, lasting until the next action.
31000001: Increases DMG dealt by all allies' Ultimates by 50%. After defeating an enemy target, the attacker's action is Advanced Forward by 25%.
31000002: Before enemy units with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, tally the amount of DoT they receive. When a unit is Weakness Broken, deal to this unit Additional DMG equal to 170% of the tallied DoT.
31000003: Increases DMG dealt by all allies' Basic ATK and Skills by 50%. After defeating an enemy target, the attacker's action is Advanced Forward by 25%.
31000004: Before enemy units with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, tally the amount of Follow-Up ATK DMG they receive. When the unit is Weakness Broken, deal to this unit Additional DMG equal to 200% of the tallied DMG.
31000005: Follow-Up ATKs/Counters will also reduce the Toughness of targets that do not have the corresponding Weakness, with the effect being equivalent to 50%/100% of the original Toughness Reduction from abilities.
31000006: The DMG dealt by all allies' Basic ATK increases by 25%, with an additional increase of 25% against targets that are Weakness Broken.
31000007: When an ally Breaks an enemy target's Weakness, Advances Action Forward by 25%.
31000008: Increases Break DMG taken by all enemies by 20%.
31000009: Increases CRIT DMG dealt by all allies' Skill by 40%, with an additional increase of 40% against targets who are Weakness Broken.
31000010: Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by characters ignores 15% of the enemy target's All-Type RES and can also reduce the Toughness of targets that do not have the corresponding Weakness, with the effect being equivalent to 50% of the original Toughness Reduction from the ability.
31000012: When an ally Breaks an enemy target's Weakness, Advance their Action Forward by 15%. This effect can trigger a max of 1 time(s) per turn.
31000013: When characters attack Weakness Broken enemies, all DoTs currently applied to the enemies will immediately deal DMG equal to 80% of the original DMG. This effect can trigger a max of 2 time(s) on each character in a single turn.
31000014: After defeating enemy targets, increase Break DMG taken by all enemies by 5% to a max of 5 stack(s). This effect will also take effect on new enemies entering the battlefield.
31000015: Increases the CRIT DMG of Ultimate DMG dealt by 30%, with an additional increase of 30% against enemy targets that are Weakness Broken.
31000016: Increases the DMG dealt by all allies' Basic ATKs by 50%.
31000017: After defeating any enemy target, advances all ally targets' actions by 10%.
31000018: After a character uses Follow-Up ATK, advances their action by 15%. This effect can be triggered a max of 1 time(s) per character before their next action.
31000019: The Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 25% when characters deal Ultimate DMG.
31000020: Increases all ally characters' Break Effect by 50%. When a character Breaks an enemy target's Weakness, regenerates 5 Energy to the character.
31000021: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by 10%. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by 20% for 2 turn(s).
31000022: Before enemy units with Steadfast Safeguard are Weakness Broken, tally the amount of DoT they receive. When a unit is Weakness Broken, deals Additional DMG to this unit equal to 200% of the tallied DoT.
31000023: Increases Quantum DMG dealt by all allies' by 60%. After defeating an enemy target, advances the attacker's action by 15%.
31000024: When using Skill or Ultimate on one ally target, increases the ability target's ATK by 25%, lasting for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 2 time(s).
31000025: Increases Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies to Weakness Broken enemies by 70%.
31000026: Increases Basic ATK and Skill DMG dealt by all allies by 55%.
31000027: When 2 or more characters following the Path of Erudition are in the team, increases all allies' ATK by 60%.
31000028: Increases Physical DMG dealt by all allies by 50% and Effect RES by 50%.
31000029: When an ally unit Breaks an Enemy target's Weakness, advances the ally unit's action by 20%.
31000030: When characters attack Weakness Broken enemies, all DoTs currently applied to the enemies will immediately deal DMG equal to 60% of the original DMG. This effect can trigger a max of 1 time(s) on each character in a single turn.
31000031: Increases CRIT DMG of all allies' Basic ATK and Ultimate DMG dealt by 30%, with an additional increase of 30% against enemy targets that are Weakness Broken.
31000032: Increases DMG dealt by all allies' Basic ATK by 50%. After defeating an enemy target, advances the attacker's action by 10%.
31000033: Increases the SPD of all allies by 15% and reduces their DMG taken by 15%.
31000034: When using Skill or Ultimate on one ally target, increases the ability target's CRIT DMG by 35%, lasting for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 2 time(s).
31000035: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by 10%. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by 20% for 2 turn(s).
31000036: Teaching and Learning Go Banana in Peel
Increases all allies' Skill DMG and Ultimate DMG dealt by 50%.
31000037: While any character following the Path of Erudition is in the team, increases all allies' All-Type RES PEN by 15%.
31000038: Increases Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by 50% and Effect RES by 50%.
31000039: After any ally target consumes their own HP, increases their DMG dealt by 55% for 3 turn(s).
31000040: When any ally target Breaks an enemy target's Weakness, increases all ally targets' SPD by 20% for 2 turn(s).
31000041: After any ally target's HP was consumed, they restore HP equal to 60% of the HP consumed. This can restore a maximum of 50% HP per turn.
31000042: Increases ally targets' Follow-Up ATK DMG dealt by 30%, with an additional increase of 30% against enemy targets that are Weakness Broken.
31000043: Increases memosprite's Weakness Break Efficiency by 50%. Ignores 20% of the target's DEF when memosprite deals DMG.
31000044: Increases Physical DMG dealt by all allies by 50%. When a unit uses a Skill, restores 20% of that unit's HP.
31000045: The DMG dealt by the character in position 1 in the lineup increases by 60%. For every 4 Skill Points consumed, 1 Skill Point is recovered.
31000046: After any ally target consumes their own HP, increases their DMG dealt by 40% for 3 turn(s).
31000047: After an ally target deals DoT to an enemy, 1 Energy is regenerated. DoT dealt by all allies ignores 40% of enemy targets' All-Type RES.
31000048: When an ally target consumes 1 Skill Point, increases the DMG dealt by all allies by 6%, stacking up to 10 time(s).
31000049: After defeating enemy targets, increases Break DMG taken by all enemies by 15% to a max of 4 stack(s). This effect will also take effect on new enemies entering the battlefield.
31000050: After any ally target consumes their own HP, their CRIT DMG increases by 55%, lasting for 2 turn(s).
31000051: Increases Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by 30%, and additionally increases by 30% against enemy targets in Weakness Broken state.
31000052: When allies use Basic ATK or Skill to attack Weakness Broken enemies, all DoTs currently applied to the enemies will immediately deal DMG equal to 15% of the original DMG.
31000053: After the character in position 1 in the team uses Ultimate, their Weakness Break Efficiency increases by 50% and increases CRIT DMG by 50%, lasting for 1 turn(s).
31000054: Increases Physical DMG dealt by all allies by 50%, and decreases all enemies' Physical RES by 20%.
31000055: When allies use Basic ATK or Skill to attack Weakness Broken enemies, all DoTs currently applied to the enemies will immediately deal DMG equal to 20% of the original DMG.
31000056: DMG dealt by memosprites ignores 20% of the target's DEF.
31000057: Increases all allies' Skill DMG by 30%. At the start of their turn, if their current HP percentage is equal to or lower than 1%, restores HP equal to 15% of their Max HP.
31000058: When a character uses Ultimate, increases their Weakness Break Efficiency by 100% and increases CRIT DMG by 40%, lasting for 3 turn(s).
31000059: At the start of battle, when there are 2/3/4 Remembrance characters in the team, increases the DMG enemy targets received by 5%/10%/20% respectively. This effect also applies to all new enemies that enter combat.
31000060: Increases Ice DMG dealt by all ally targets by 50% and increases SPD by 10%.
31000061: When ally targets deal DMG to enemy targets afflicted with 3 DoT states or more, increases Weakness Break Efficiency by 50%.
31000062: Increases the Weakness Break DMG received by all enemies by 15%, and additionally increases Super Break DMG received by 20%.
31000063: Increases Break DMG dealt by all allies by 10%. When an enemy target enters the Weakness Break state, further increases Break DMG by 5%. This effect can stack up to 4 time(s).
31000064: The 1st character in the lineup ignores 15% of the enemy target's DEF when dealing DMG.
31000065: When ally targets consume Skill Points, increases their CRIT DMG by 6%, stacking up to 10 times.
31000066: While any character following the Path of Erudition is in the team, increases all allies' All-Type RES PEN by 25%.
31000067: When there are 3 ally memosprites or more currently on the field, increases all allies' DMG dealt by 60%.
31000068: After ally targets attack an enemy target with 1 or more DoT states, increases their SPD by 25% for 3 turn(s).
31000069: All allies' Elation DMG ignores 15% of enemy target's All-Type RES. When an enemy target's War Armor or Centirefined War Armor are broken, gains 3 Punchline points.
31000070: After an ally target uses their Ultimate, the CRIT DMG dealt by their Skill increases by 50% for 2 turn(s).
31000071: Increases Follow-Up ATK and Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by 50%, and additionally increases by 50% against enemy targets in Weakness Broken state.
31000072: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by 10%. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by 15% for 2 turn(s).
31000073: Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by 30%. Additionally increases the CRIT DMG by 30% for the 1st character in the team lineup and their memosprite.
31000074: Increases DoT dealt to enemy targets in the Weakness Broken state by 30%.
31000075: Increases Elation DMG taken by all enemies by 30%. When there is a character following the Path of Elation on the team, increases the Weakness Break Efficiency of all allies by 50%.
31000076: After an ally target uses an attack that deals Elation DMG, inflicts Vulnerability on the target receiving Elation DMG, increasing the DMG they take by 15% for 2 turn(s). This effect can trigger up to 1 time per enemy target per attack.
31000077: After any ally target inflicts a debuff to an enemy target, increases their CRIT DMG by 75% for 2 turn(s).
31000078: After an ally target deals DoT to an enemy, 1 Energy is regenerated. DoT dealt by all allies ignores 40% of enemy targets' All-Type RES.
31000079: Increases Skill and Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by 30%, and additionally increases Skill and Ultimate DMG dealt by the 1st character in the lineup by 30%.
31000080: Decreases the Wind RES and Lightning RES of all enemies by 40%.
40000000: When the number of ally targets currently on the field is not 4, all allies' DMG dealt increases by 60%.
40000001: Whenever any ally uses their Ultimate, ignores 40% of target's DEF. After Ultimate deals DMG, the next Skill will ignore 40% of target's DEF.
40000002: After receiving Shield effects or healing from ally targets (excluding this unit), reduces DMG taken by this unit by 25%, and increases All-Type RES PEN by 20% for 2 turn(s).
40000003: Increases CRIT DMG of all ally targets by 50%. When using Healing Rainbow, the increased Max HP is further raised by 60%.
40000004: Increases all allies' Basic ATK, Skill, and Ultimate DMG by 80%. When using Healing Rainbow, additionally increases all allies' ATK by 2000 points.
40000005: Increases all allies' DoT All-Type RES PEN by 40%. When using Healing Rainbow, additionally increases all allies' SPD by 30%.
40000006: Increases all ally targets' Break Effect by 60%. Each time an enemy target's Toughness is reduced to 0, increases Break DMG taken by that target by 15%, stacking up to 4 times.
40000007: Increases all ally targets' ATK by 40%. When using Horizon's Echo From Afar, additionally increases all ally targets' ATK by 20%, this effect is stackable.
40000008: Increases all ally targets' DMG by 40%. After an ally target uses an attack, applies Weakness corresponding to this unit's Type to the attacked enemy target. This effect is removed when the enemy target recovers from Weakness Break state.
40000009: This stage has a special Elation Skill. When entering Aha Instant, deals 15 instance(s) of Imaginary Elation DMG to a random enemy target. When Aha Instant ends, all allies gain 10% All-Type RES PEN, lasting for 2 turn(s).
40000010: Enemy targets on the sub-field receive 30% more final DMG but cannot take CRIT hits.
40000011: Increases all ally targets' DMG dealt by 40% and increases the SPD of prime-field ally targets by 40%.
40000012: Increases Elation for all allies by 40%. When an Aha Instant ends, all ally characters regenerate 10% Energy.
40000013: After an enemy target is hit by an ally's Follow-Up ATK, DMG taken by them increases by 15% for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 4 time(s).
40000014: Increases all ally targets' DMG dealt by 40% and increases ally's Alloy Pommy's SPD by 50%.
40000015: Elation DMG dealt by ally targets ignores 30% of the target's DEF. Ally characters gain 6 Punchline(s) at the start of their turn.
40000016: Increases Break DMG dealt to enemy targets by 30%. When an enemy target enters the Weakness Broken state, advances all allies' actions by 5%.
40000017: Increases the DMG dealt by all ally targets by 40%, decreases All-Type RES of Paramount Bliss Inverted: Illwish Archlotus and their summons by 20%.
40000018: Increases all allies' Elation by 50%. At the start of Aha Instant, allies additionally gain 10 Punchline point(s).
40000019: Adds Fire Weakness and Lightning Weakness to Starcrusher Swarm King: Skaracabaz (Synthetic) and its summons, and decreases the Fire RES and Lightning RES of the above targets by 60%.
40000020: Increases DMG dealt by all ally targets by 30%. After each time an ally target defeats an enemy target, additionally increases the DMG dealt by this unit by 3%. This effect is stackable.
40000021: Increases the All-Type RES PEN for the Skill DMG and Ultimate DMG dealt by the character in position 1 in the lineup by 50%.
40000022: After an enemy target is hit by an ally's Follow-Up ATK, DMG taken by them increases by 15% for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack up to 3 time(s).
40000023: All ally targets' All-Type RES PEN increases by 20%, and the All-Type RES PEN of Elation DMG dealt additionally increases by 20%.
40000024: Increases all ally targets' Elation by 40%, and increases the All-Type RES PEN of Elation DMG dealt by 20%. This effect is doubled when using an Elation Skill.
40000025: At the start of any ally target's turn, all ally targets regenerate 25% Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per battle. Increases Skill and Ultimate DMG dealt by all ally targets by 40%.
40000026: Increases the SPD of all ally targets by 10%, and increases the SPD of Cyrene's Support ♪ by 25%.
41000000: Enemy target initially has 2 stack(s) of Resilient Armor, and each stack reduces DMG taken by 15%. Enemy targets lose 1 stack of Resilient Armor each time their Toughness is reduced to 0. Stacks of this effect will reset at each of the enemy target's phase.
41000000.1: Enemy target initially has 3 stack(s) of Resilient Armor+, and each stack reduces DMG taken by 15%. Enemy targets lose 1 stack of Resilient Armor+ each time their Toughness is reduced to 0. Stacks of this effect will reset at each of the enemy target's phase.
41000000.2: Enemy target initially has 4 stack(s) of Resilient Armor++, and each stack reduces DMG taken by 15%. Enemy targets lose 1 stack of Resilient Armor++ each time their Toughness is reduced to 0. Stacks of this effect will reset at each of the enemy target's phase.
41000001: For every 1% HP the enemy target loses, reduces CRIT DMG dealt to them by 3%.
41000002: Each time after the enemy target is attacked, the attacker will lose HP equal to 2% of their own Max HP. This effect is Non-fatal.
41000002.1: Each time after the enemy target is attacked, the attacker will lose HP equal to 3% of their own Max HP. This effect is Non-fatal.
41000002.2: Each time after the enemy target is attacked, the attacker will lose HP equal to 4% of their own Max HP. This effect is Non-fatal.
41000003: All non-elite enemy targets won't have their HP and Toughness reduced, and increases their Effect RES by 100%. When all elite enemy targets are defeated, remaining enemy targets will also be eliminated.
41000004: After an enemy target receives an attack, reduces the attacker's Energy by 2 points, except when the attacker's Energy is maxed. When an enemy target is defeated, the attacker regenerates 10 Energy.
41000004.1: After an enemy target receives an attack, reduces the attacker's Energy by 3 points, except when the attacker's Energy is maxed. When an enemy target is defeated, the attacker regenerates 10 Energy.
41000004.2: After an enemy target receives an attack, reduces the attacker's Energy by 4 points, except when the attacker's Energy is maxed. When an enemy target is defeated, the attacker regenerates 10 Energy.
41000005: When ally targets are being attacked by enemies, the Sunder effect will be inflicted on them. Each stack additionally causes the holder to lose HP equal to 0.8% of their Max HP. This effect can be stacked indefinitely and cannot be dissipated. After targets with Sunder received a Shield from an ally target other than themselves or healing, all Sunder effects are dispelled on both targets.
41000005.1: When ally targets are being attacked by enemies, the Sunder+ effect will be inflicted on them. Each stack additionally causes the holder to lose HP equal to 1.2% of their Max HP. This effect can be stacked indefinitely and cannot be dissipated. After targets with Sunder+ received a Shield from an ally target other than themselves or healing, all Sunder+ effects are dispelled on both targets.
41000005.2: When ally targets are being attacked by enemies, the Sunder++ effect will be inflicted on them. Each stack additionally causes the holder to lose HP equal to 1.6% of their Max HP. This effect can be stacked indefinitely and cannot be dissipated. After targets with Sunder++ received a Shield from an ally target other than themselves or healing, all Sunder++ effects are dispelled on both targets.
41000006: Enemy target takes immediate action after being attacked 6 time(s). This tally resets at the start of the enemy target's turn.
41000006.1: Enemy target takes immediate action after being attacked 5 time(s). This tally resets at the start of the enemy target's turn.
41000006.2: Enemy target takes immediate action after being attacked 4 time(s). This tally resets at the start of the enemy target's turn.
41000007: After the enemy target uses an attack, randomly causes 5% or 10% action delay to the attacked target.
41000007.1: After the enemy target uses an attack, randomly causes 5% or 20% action delay to the attacked target.
41000007.2: After the enemy target uses an attack, randomly causes 5% or 30% action delay to the attacked target.
41000008: When entering combat, reduces ally target's Energy by 50% and decreases their Energy Regeneration Rate by 50% outside of their turn for 2 turn(s).
41000008.1: When entering combat, reduces ally target's Energy by 75% and decreases their Energy Regeneration Rate by 75% outside of their turn for 2 turn(s).
41000008.2: When entering combat, reduces ally target's Energy by 100% and decreases their Energy Regeneration Rate by 100% outside of their turn for 2 turn(s).
41000009: After the enemy target takes DMG, reduces DMG taken by this unit by 2% and CRIT DMG taken by 4%, stacking up to 10 time(s). These stacks are cleared when the enemy target's turn begins or when they enter the Weakness Break state. While the enemy target is in the Weakness Break state, stacks cannot be accumulated.
41000009.1: After the enemy target takes DMG, reduces DMG taken by this unit by 3% and CRIT DMG taken by 6%, stacking up to 10 time(s). These stacks are cleared when the enemy target's turn begins or when they enter the Weakness Break state. While the enemy target is in the Weakness Break state, stacks cannot be accumulated.
41000009.2: After the enemy target takes DMG, reduces DMG taken by this unit by 4% and CRIT DMG taken by 8%, stacking up to 10 time(s). These stacks are cleared when the enemy target's turn begins or when they enter the Weakness Break state. While the enemy target is in the Weakness Break state, stacks cannot be accumulated.
41000010: Ally targets initially obtain 10 stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own CRIT DMG by 15%. This effect cannot be dispelled. Each time any ally target consumes a Skill Point, 1 stack is removed from all ally targets.
41000011: Ally targets initially obtain 2 stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own DMG by 10%. This effect cannot be dispelled, and 1 stack is removed after each Ultimate used.
41000011.1: Ally targets initially obtain 2 stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own DMG by 20%. This effect cannot be dispelled, and 1 stack is removed after each Ultimate used.
41000011.2: Ally targets initially obtain 2 stack(s) of this effect, with each stack decreasing their own DMG by 30%. This effect cannot be dispelled, and 1 stack is removed after each Ultimate used.
41000012: At the start of battle, 1 ally character(s) with the highest SPD have their SPD reduced by 20%, and 1 ally character(s) with the lowest SPD have their SPD increased by 15%.
41000012.1: At the start of battle, 2 ally character(s) with the highest SPD have their SPD reduced by 20%, and 1 ally character(s) with the lowest SPD have their SPD increased by 15%.
41000012.2: At the start of battle, 3 ally character(s) with the highest SPD have their SPD reduced by 20%, and 1 ally character(s) with the lowest SPD have their SPD increased by 15%.
41000013: Decreases the DMG dealt by all ally targets by 10%, and decreases their DMG taken by 10%.
41000013.1: Decreases the DMG dealt by all ally targets by 20%, and decreases their DMG taken by 10%.
41000013.2: Decreases the DMG dealt by all ally targets by 30%, and decreases their DMG taken by 10%.
41000014: Each time after an enemy target is attacked by allies, DMG taken by them decreases by 2% and CRIT DMG taken decreases by 4%, stacking up to 10 time(s). This effect changes to decreasing by 5 stack(s) after the enemy target receives a Follow-Up ATK or when Aha Instant ends.
41000014.1: Each time after an enemy target is attacked by allies, DMG taken by them decreases by 3% and CRIT DMG taken decreases by 6%, stacking up to 10 time(s). This effect changes to decreasing by 5 stack(s) after the enemy target receives a Follow-Up ATK or when Aha Instant ends.
41000014.2: Each time after an enemy target is attacked by allies, DMG taken by them decreases by 4% and CRIT DMG taken decreases by 8%, stacking up to 10 time(s). This effect changes to decreasing by 5 stack(s) after the enemy target receives a Follow-Up ATK or when Aha Instant ends.
41000015: At the start of ally targets' turns, they lose 500 HP. This effect can be fatal.
41000015.1: At the start of ally targets' turns, they lose 1000 HP. This effect can be fatal.
41000015.2: At the start of ally targets' turns, they lose 1500 HP. This effect can be fatal.
41000016: After each time an ally target uses their Ultimate, applies 1 stack of this effect to all enemy targets. Each stack increases the enemy target's SPD by 30%, up to a max of 4 stack(s). All stacks of this effect are cleared at the start of the enemy target's turn.
41000016.1: After each time an ally target uses their Ultimate, applies 1 stack of this effect to all enemy targets. Each stack increases the enemy target's SPD by 50%, up to a max of 4 stack(s). All stacks of this effect are cleared at the start of the enemy target's turn.
41000016.2: After each time an ally target uses their Ultimate, applies 1 stack of this effect to all enemy targets. Each stack increases the enemy target's SPD by 70%, up to a max of 4 stack(s). All stacks of this effect are cleared at the start of the enemy target's turn.
41000017: Enemy targets initially have 20 stacks of this effect. Each stack reduces enemy targets' DMG taken by 2%. Enemy targets lose 1 stack each time they are attacked. Stacks of this effect will reset during boss enemy phase transitions.
41000017.1: Enemy targets initially have 20 stacks of this effect. Each stack reduces enemy targets' DMG taken by 3%. Enemy targets lose 1 stack each time they are attacked. Stacks of this effect will reset during boss enemy phase transitions.
41000017.2: Enemy targets initially have 20 stacks of this effect. Each stack reduces enemy targets' DMG taken by 4%. Enemy targets lose 1 stack each time they are attacked. Stacks of this effect will reset during boss enemy phase transitions.
